overview.title: SFT 代码能力优化闭环
overview.subtitle: Baseline -> LoRA/QLoRA SFT -> 错误分析 -> 代码修复 SFT -> 前端验收展示

metrics.label: Repair SFT 样本总数
metrics.note: 来自 MBPP 失败评测样本

metrics.label: 训练 / 验证
metrics.note: 当前 sft_cgh2 数据划分

metrics.label: repair_pass@1
metrics.note: 验证集 25 条，修对 3 条

stages.name: Baseline
stages.description: 评测基座模型的原始代码生成能力，作为所有优化的参照。

stages.name: LoRA / QLoRA 实验
stages.description: 比较不同 rank、target module、量化方式对代码生成能力和资源占用的影响。

stages.name: 错误分析与优化
stages.description: 把模型失败样本按错误类型拆解，定位主要瓶颈，再进行数据和 prompt 优化。

stages.name: 代码修复 SFT
stages.description: 将失败样本转成“题目 + 错误代码 + 报错 -> 修复代码”的监督微调任务。

experiments.input: 题目 + 错误代码 + 失败测试/报错
experiments.goal: 根据执行反馈修复代码

repairCases.problem: Write a function to check if given tuple contains no duplicates.
repairCases.feedback: Passed 0 / 3 tests. NameError: name 'check_distinct' is not defined. Failed assertion: assert check_distinct((1, 4, 5, 6, 1, 4)) == False

repairCases.problem: Write a python function to find the element of a list having maximum length.
repairCases.feedback: Passed 0 / 3 tests. NameError: name 'Find_Max' is not defined. Failed assertion: assert Find_Max([['A'],['A','B'],['A','B','C']]) == ['A','B','C']

repairCases.problem: Write a function to find the intersection of two arrays.
repairCases.feedback: Passed 0 / 3 tests. NameError: name 'intersection_array' is not defined. Failed assertion: assert intersection_array([1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 8, 9, 10],[1, 2, 4, 8, 9])==[1, 2, 8, 9]
